headline: Boston Scientific's Fall From Penthouse To Doghouse Creates A Value Opportunity
summary: Boston Scientific has suffered a 50% share price decline amid decelerating growth, but fundamentals-based valuation now appears attractive. Read more here.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains a Buy Rating on Boston Scientific (BSX)
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the Stocks Expected to Bounce Back According to Analysts. The stock has fallen more than 52% year-to-date, but the Street expects more than 65% upside from the current level. ​Recently, on June 16, TD Cowen analyst Josh Jennings maintained his Buy rating on Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) with […]

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Boston Scientific, Lowers Price Target to $65
summary: Stifel  analyst Rick Wise   maintains Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $75 to $65.
